case_title: HSBC BANK USA N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF VS. RODOLFO G. BEBING et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT ROTH, CARMELITA HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CARMELITA ROTH'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF AMENDING THE COMPLAINT TO STATE A CLAIM AS TO THESE DEFENDANTS AND SERVING THEM A NEW SUMMONS IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
